ShortDescription.Value: Allows emergency vehicles (police cars, firetrucks and ambulances) to ghost through traffic without collision.

Publish.LongDescription: Allows emergency vehicles (police cars, firetrucks and ambulances) to ghost through traffic without collision. # Behaviour - By default emergency vehicles will move at 50% speed to encourage maintaining a smooth traffic flow. Speed can be adjusted in the mod settings. - By default, the ghosting is only active when a vehicle is responding to an emergency or transporting a patient. This can be changed to always allow ghosting in the mod settings. **Thumbnail image** The thumbnail image is ai-generated, I will update it when I have the time.

ChangeLog.Value: Potential fix for vehicles spinning when responding to accidents. Removed need for disable accidents
